title: Let us copy/paste values across different Monday instances (tabs)
excerpt:
Would be neat to be able to have 2 Monday tabs open to copy/paste data from one board to another. For some reason, the copy/paste currently does not work from one Monday tab to another.

posts.author: bob1 (bob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be neat to be able to have 2 Monday tabs open to copy/paste data from one board to another. For some reason, the copy/paste currently does not work from one Monday tab to another.

Currently, the only way to copy/paste data from one board to another is to go to board A, copy the value, then go to board B and paste the value. When you have 1 value to copy/paste it’s fine, but if you have 10 that’s 20 board switches you have to make just to copy/paste those 10 values.

If you could copy/paste across different Monday tabs it would make it much faster.
